key_points: Freshmen are required to live in dorms; single rooms exist but unclear process
Students ask repeatedly about community bathrooms vs. private options
Harvey Hall vs. White Hall debate is common among incoming students
key_quotes: How'd you end up getting a single dorm? Was it by regular application or offered at higher price?
Can you do a room tour and kinda like how the community bathrooms look... I want to attend Tuskegee and idk about the community bathroom madness.
Can you be a honors student freshman year? And which hall is better Harvey or White?

key_points: Greek life dominates campus culture; non-D9 students can feel invisible
Homecoming is legendary — alumni travel from everywhere to return
Students say you'll find your tribe if you put yourself out there
key_quotes: Homecoming just stop! For an area so remote it's ridiculous how all come back.
I go to Tuskegee and can agree... You'll definitely find your tribe at an HBCU.
I don't like how much HBCUs center fraternities and sororities... What about SGA, what about the newspaper, what about the debate team?

key_points: No specific dining hall complaints surfaced, but limited data available
Students vlog about cooking for roommates, suggesting dining may be lacking
No mention of dining hall quality in any student review
key_quotes: Appreciate that... cooking for the roommates makes the vlog feel authentic.
Back then there used to be a Walmart in town... we'd never even heard of a Walmart back then until we got to Tuskegee.

key_points: The academic grind is real and acknowledged openly by alumni
Isolation from being first-gen or not fitting the legacy mold causes stress
No mention of counseling services or mental health resources on campus
key_quotes: The struggle is real. Amazingly you learn so much and that struggle prepares you for the real world.
I'm kinda scared cuz I took a gap year but I'm excited because this is my dream school.
Everybody is Jack and Jill, entire family D9, 4th generation student... it makes me not want to be here.

key_points: Full rides are available and competitive — multiple students report winning them
Tuskegee offered full rides when Howard offered $20K and Spelman offered nothing
Accreditation battle with veterinary program raised financial anxiety for families
key_quotes: Howard offered me 20k out of their 58k cost of attendance. Spelman offered me $0. Tuskegee offered me a full ride.
I just got two full rides! From Hampton & Tuskegee! Heeeeeeck yeeeaaaaah!
OMG, that would be awful. The vet science program is a possible for my kid.

key_points: Ten students maintained perfect 4.0 GPA all four years in Class of 2026
Engineering programs are nationally competitive — won AMIE Design Challenge
Vet school is the only HBCU program of its kind; faced accreditation threat
key_quotes: 10 members of Tuskegee University's Class of 2026 achieved a perfect 4.0 grade point average across all four years.
Tuskegee placed 1st out of 15 in the AMIE Design Challenge.
Tuskegee Sues American Veterinary Association For Trying To Revoke Accreditation.

key_points: Vet school accreditation fight suggests administration faces external pressure
No direct student complaints about admin responsiveness in the data
Admissions office communicates via mailed acceptance packets — slow and confusing
key_quotes: I spoke to one of the ladies at the admissions office they said I will receive an 'acceptance packet' in the mail. I'm super scared.
The suit was quickly settled... Tuskegee rallies around nation's only HBCU veterinary school after accreditation threat.
Anyone applied to Tuskegee? How many days they take to send the application account details?

key_points: Tuskegee, Alabama is extremely remote — students from urban areas feel the isolation
Tornado warnings are a real concern for students from states like California
Town is small; a Walmart was considered a big deal in past decades
key_quotes: For an area so remote it's ridiculous how all come back [for Homecoming].
Talk about the tornado warnings. Cali doesn't have these! What do you have to do to protect yourself?
Coming from northern Indiana, we had never even heard of a Walmart back then, until we got to Tuskegee.

key_points: Alumni express strong pride and competitive edge in careers post-graduation
ROTC scholarships draw students nationally, signaling strong military pipeline
Engineering and vet medicine grads are well-regarded in their fields
key_quotes: Can't tell you how many times I've said: they must not know I went to Skegee. We are a special breed.
I came there in 1984. I can't believe that since then I retired from the military and became a school teacher.
Loved my time there in the late 1980s... Business House - Finance. The struggle is real but allows for so much growth.

key_points: Full rides are genuinely available; one student chose Tuskegee over Brown with full scholarship
Tuskegee ranked #100 in selectivity nationally — competitive but not unattainable
Students weigh remote location against strong scholarships and HBCU experience
key_quotes: I'm leaning one way — Tuskegee University in Alabama on a full-ride — but I'd love to hear how others may approach it.
Howard offered me 20k out of their 58k cost. Spelman offered $0. Tuskegee offered me a full ride.
Apply everywhere! Tuskegee offered me a full ride.

key_points: Alumni loyalty is fierce and lifelong — 'forever love' is a common phrase
Students describe a tight-knit, proud culture that builds resilience
The 'struggle' narrative is real but framed positively by most who survived it
key_quotes: It's a forever ❤️ love. Homecoming just stop!
Had me like whaaa for a min cause I rock with Skegee hard. But you ain't lyin that struggle is real but allows for so much growth.
Can't tell you how many times I've said: they must not know I went to Skegee. We are a special breed.

key_points: **Accreditation:** Vet school's only HBCU status threatened by AVMA revocation attempt
**Isolation:** Remote Alabama location is a real shock for out-of-state urban students
**Housing Transparency:** Single room availability, bathroom types, and dorm quality poorly communicated
key_quotes: Tuskegee Sues American Veterinary Association For Trying To Revoke Accreditation.
Talk about the tornado warnings. Cali doesn't have these!
I want to attend Tuskegee next year and idk about the community bathroom madness.

key_points: Tuskegee's AMIE Engineering Design Challenge win shows top-tier STEM competition results
Band culture is deep — battles with high school bands on MLK Day are a real tradition
Mackenzie Scott donated to Tuskegee — institutional investment is growing quietly
key_quotes: Congrats to my classmates who were a part of the Tuskegee team — they placed 1st out of 15.
Tuskegee had a battle with Moss Point High School... they were so excited to see the high school battling with the Universities.
Mackenzie Scott donated to Skegee when I was there and a number of other HBCUs prior to this.
